description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-progress: progress bar for form completion, loading, and upload states. Connect to Drupal AJAX progress events. Determinate and indeterminate modes.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Determinate mode (0-100%)
- [ ] Indeterminate mode (animated)
- [ ] Label and value display options
- [ ] Size variants
- [ ] CSS parts: track, fill, label
- [ ] ARIA: role=progressbar, aria-valuenow/min/max
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** small
title: Implement hx-progress component
